## SDK Generation Complete ✅

SDK generation pipelines have completed for all languages. Below are the SDK pull request links:

sdk pr for Python: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-python/pull/46402
sdk pr for .NET: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/pull/58343
sdk pr for JavaScript: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/pull/38212
sdk pr for Java: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-java/pull/48864
sdk pr for Go: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-go/pull/26624

### Generation Details

| Language | Package | Pipeline | PR Status |
|----------|---------|----------|-----------|
| Python | `azure-mgmt-containerservice` | [6178334](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/internal/_build/results?buildId=6178334) | draft |
| .NET | `Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService` | [6178338](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/internal/_build/results?buildId=6178338) | draft |
| JavaScript | `@azure/arm-containerservice` | [6178337](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/internal/_build/results?buildId=6178337) | draft |
| Java | `azure-resourcemanager-containerservice` | [6178339](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/internal/_build/results?buildId=6178339) | draft |
| Go | `sdk/resourcemanager/containerservice/armcontainerservice` | [6178336](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/internal/_build/results?buildId=6178336) | draft |

**API Version**: 2026-02-02-preview | **Release Type**: beta | **Spec PR**: https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/pull/41217 (merged)
